reviews.text:
Dr. Steiner at Gameday Men’s Health is truly exceptional when it comes to hormones and peptide therapy. His depth of knowledge in testosterone optimization, hormone replacement therapy (HRT), and advanced peptide protocols is immediately evident. He doesn’t just follow trends. He understands the physiology, the science, and how to apply it safely and effectively for real results.

What sets Dr. Steiner apart is his ability to explain complex hormone and peptide concepts in a clear, practical way. He takes the time to review labs thoroughly, connect symptoms to root causes, and design personalized treatment plans instead of one-size-fits-all protocols. His understanding of peptides for recovery, energy, body composition, and overall optimization is especially impressive.

If you’re looking for a doctor who is highly educated, up to date on the latest advancements in hormone therapy and peptides, and genuinely cares about patient outcomes, Dr. Steiner is the real deal. Gameday Men’s Health is fortunate to have someone with his level of expertise. I would confidently recommend him to anyone seeking hormone optimization, testosterone therapy, or peptide treatment from a knowledgeable and trustworthy provider.

reviews.text:
I had the unique opportunity over this past weekend to sit down with Dr. Matt Steiner at the Longevity Regen Summit in Clearwater Florida and discuss his approach to wellness, regenerative medicine and men's health issues. I have to say I was impressed by his degree of knowledge and overall approach dealing with chronic health issues. This is a doctor I would refer my patients to outside my scope of practice. Thank you Dr. Steiner for our discussion. It was a pleasure meeting with you.
Dr. Brian Petrie

reviews.text: Gameday Men’s Health Bargersville has helped  me tremendously in increase my strength, stamina and recovery.  I haven’t felt this great in many years.  Also improve my libido as well. Fully recommend their medical services to everyone.  Excellent and friendly staff as well.

reviews.name: places/ChIJD3aJCWdna4gRH2rlcuAPmh4/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tGcWVFUkZhRTlKTkhFM0xWaHdTekpCVkVaSVkwRRAB
reviews.text:
Dr. Matt Steiner is the real differentiator at Gameday Men’s Health in Bargersville, Indiana. His concierge approach makes treatments like TRT and peptides genuinely affordable and accessible for everyday men looking to level up their health.
I personally started testosterone therapy (TRT) through this clinic and the results speak for themselves. I’ve also tried peptide protocols including BPC-157 and the Wolverine blend (BPC-157 + TB-500), both well-known for recovery and performance support.
The clinic offers a stacked lineup: hormone therapy, peptides, PRP hair restoration, GLP-1 weight care, Sermorelin, Trimix, the P Shot, shockwave therapy, plus vitamin injections like B12 and Vitamin C. You’re paying for real therapies that work, and they deliver.
Beyond the medicine, the environment is a win—friendly staff, high energy, a welcoming atmosphere, and you’re greeted and treated with respect from the moment you walk in. No awkward waiting, no confusion, no inflated pricing.
If you want effective, affordable men’s health treatments and a team that actually treats you like a grown man, this clinic is an easy recommendation.
Ed Freeman

reviews.text:
I would definitely recommend Renew Vitality -- They seem to run a more structured/professional operation than most clinics and their customer service is top-notch. If you start with them, ask for Bill -- He provides a level of service that you just don't see anywhere else in 2026. Bill is available pretty much 24 hours-a-day and really seems genuinely interested in helping out -- He makes the process of HRT simple and easy. Shipments are quick and Renew have been very accommodating of my request for specific blood tests through Quest. I plan to continue with Renew despite their higher pricing -- The service is worth the extra cost for me.

I give Renew Vitality 4 stars because I think there is room for improvement -- Better pricing for loyal customers would make it into 4.5 stars for me, and finally, better communication options with the doctor (who is carefully proxied/hidden behind the renew vitality team, although I did meet him in person initially) would make it into 5 stars.

reviews.text: The team at Body Logic’s are very friendly and knowledgeable. Their process is very thorough going through extensive blood panels, urine tests, and muscle tone tests to determine your hormone levels. Dr Reynolds is very thorough going though all test results and offering solutions including diet changes to aid in improving your hormone levels. This has been tremendously helpful to weather through menopause. I’ve been dealing with hormone imbalances for over 27 years and this is the first time anyone has ever helped!  I would highly recommend going here!  They don’t take insurance so be aware it’s out of pocket. You can submit to your insurance on your own.

But it doesn't end there, so let's move on back to the nurse practitioners. Ellen and Jen, both of which are very easy on the eyes, will take it from there. I could talk to these young ladies for days and usually do. Great conversations in a friendly atmosphere. But they also care. They both run a tight ship on your medical history and how you're feeling and responding to the treatment as well as charting a path forward to give you the best results for your health and wellbeing. Backup comes from team players McKenzie and Nicole. Both of these young ladies are a huge asset to the success of this team and I've had the pleasure of knowing McKenzie since I started this journey back in 2014. I couldn't be happier than I am with the Low T Center in Carmel. I'm a lifer and I'll be coming here until I take my very last shot! Todd MF Johnson

reviews.text: FFH is by far the best doctors office I have ever been to. They really do give you an elevated experience - much better than the standard primary care doctor that most of us are used to going to. They look at everything in a much more holistic way and really try to get to the root causes of issues - their first instinct isn't to just write an RX for a pill like most docs. reviews.name: places/ChIJsR5-z8mtFIgRHhmkZ8MKVaw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pKR0xYWXlVamxRTFRKM2RHOVRMWGxVTkhac2RVRRAB
reviews.text:
Dr. Ellen Antoine and her staff are truly amazing.
My husband was diagnosed with Lyme disease after many incorrect diagnoses and trips to the ER for debilitating pain. Despite finally receiving positive blood and spinal fluid results, the physicians in our city either didn't know how to help him or said it probably wasn't Lyme,  as it 'wasn't in KY' (even though he was called by the CDC because they track Lyme, and they indicated Lyme is in every state and vastly underdiagnosed).
We were contacting Cleveland Clinic when someone recommended Dr. Ellen Antoine in Carmel, IN.

Dr. Antoine is the reason my husband is back to his active, golf-loving self.  She knew exactly how to treat him, what tests to order, and why he had the symptoms he was experiencing.  Her explanations were detailed and thorough. Her knowledge of Lyme was so far above any physician he had seen prior that there  is no comparison.  She is an expert in Lyme Disease, as well as other chronic illnesses. She sees patients from all over the country. She uses a blend of in-person visits and treatments with telehealth visits for patients like my husband that were traveling to see her. Every staff person in the office was caring and exceptional.  We have recommended her many times already and will continue to do so!

reviews.text: Dr. Ellen is one of a kind! I know that she not only cares for me as a patient, but as a person too. I've seen many providers and she is very talented! The staff are all very friendly and quick to respond to any questions I may have. I feel that Dr. Ellen and hear team are genuine and  really want to help me to move my health forward!

reviews.name: places/ChIJsR5-z8mtFIgRHhmkZ8MKVaw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xGUlZEZHZRM1JqY0ZsdU5GVkdYMUpZZGw5R2RGRRAB
reviews.text:
Hello Google Searchers!  My name is Emily, and I want to encourage you by sharing my amazing functional medicine health journey with Dr. Ellen Antoine and The Center for Fully Functional Health!  It is a journey that began over 10 years ago when I discovered Dr. Ellen Antoine and made an appointment to see her because I wasn't getting the "answers" I needed to the "questions" I was asking about my health. Bottom Line:  Dr. Ellen and functional medicine GAVE me those answers, and my health improved dramatically.  Because of Dr. Ellen and functional medicine and the answers I was given all those years ago, I continue to "live life to the fullest" as an incredibly grateful and active, healthy 83 year "young" woman!

Thank you, Dr. Ellen!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJkYp-iE6tFIgRAB5WONQyQPs/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21ORU0wUlFPSEYwZEc1NFp6bHpTbnBIVm5GMU9GRRAB
reviews.text: I can’t even begin to say how much Dr. Singh at the Functional MDs has done for me in the beginning of a new health journey to get well.  I was very ill when I did a google search that landed me with who I had always wanted in a Functional Provider, one that was also an MD.  I’ve been to many physicians that seem to think I have autoimmune but none of them can try to help me start getting well or get a diagnosis.  One wanted to try a harsh medicine and I wasn’t willing to give into that.  I had been to another Functional Medicine provider who just did the same protocol for everyone and when I tried to discuss what was going on with my body he dismissed it.  I got worse and in the mix developed chronic fatigue, left sided body pain, tingling, numbness and incredible brain fog, among many other scary things, and I had been one to always rely on my intelligence.  Since my parents and I came from a ways away Dr. Singh took extra time with us and always takes the time to calm my mind and walk me through what is happening.  Since working with him and working to detox from mold at the start, I have literally become functional again within a matter of a couple months.  I never thought I would resemble me again and it is happening.  I went from a triathlete to almost nothing and it’s been hard.  I have harder issues I am dealing with and have a ways to go, but I’m confident with Dr. Singh and staff being confident in me, that I will be 100% again.  My issues are extremely complex and Dr. Singh got me at the sickest I have ever been, but with him I am seeing hope and light again.  I thank God for leading me to him with that Google search.

reviews.text: Dr Spahr provided amazing care during the year that I was with him. I dealt with a multitude of infections, imbalances, and detoxification issues that led me to being unwell. The thorough testing and treatment plans helped to put me on the right track toward good health. Dr Spahr always listened without judgement to come up with the best course of action. I appreciated my experience and wouldn’t hesitate to go back!

reviews.name: places/ChIJW_EtpD6zFIgRrOR5NojneOU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tOQk1tNWxUMjg0VnpRelpYTlRTRlpQUW10eFExRRAB
reviews.text: I struggled for years with depression, tried a few antidepressants, a supplement or two, birth control, really anything to get my depression under control. Nothing worked longer than a year or two, and my condition just got worse and piled on over time (chronic fatigue, immune issues, unexplained weight gain etc). I knew some of the things that I tried might not work or could even make me worse but felt I had no choice but trial and error because that's how the medical community is set up currently---trial and error with short term solutions (just try one medication after the other until something hopefully lands). During this WHOLE TIME (10+ years) none of the doctors (my general practitioner or my psychiatrist(s) or obgyn)  recommended that maybe we should do a comprehensive blood test to see if there are underlying imbalances. Honestly, I know the name of the place is hormone balance but it should be called the fix your body center, for the most part if you have something, anything, chronic that isn't a very specific diagnosis, chances are there is something to do with hormone/neurotransmitter/biochemical imbalances and Dr. Spahr will fix you, I promise. Their rates are reasonable and comparable given that they don't take insurance, don't get sucked into one of those big expensive programs, come here and find out what is actually wrong so you can actually get fixed. Best health to everyone!

reviews.name: places/ChIJW_EtpD6zFIgRrOR5NojneOU/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwczQzT1hREAE
reviews.text: I went to Dr. Spahr for issues with fertility/PCOS and was feeling depressed due to previous miscarriages. Dr. Spahr is very attentive. He went over my entire Medical and even Social history and explained in detail plan of care. What I love is after each office visit you get a completely typed report about everything discussed. Dr. Spahr is extremely detailed so it was really nice to re-read everything discussed or referenced back to past visits. Every appointment to me, was helpful and motivating. The staff is amazing and so kind. They are so quick at responding to any questions or concerns.  I feel like I could ask them any questions without feeling uncomfortable. I have nothing but positive experience with Dr. Spahr and his staff.  I am now pregnant and the staff continues to be so super helpful and supportive.

reviews.name: places/ChIJW_EtpD6zFIgRrOR5NojneOU/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNQdW9tUTNRRRAB
reviews.text:
Before I came to see Dr. Spahr, I was feeling horrible. Fatigued, cranky, bloated, constipated and could never sleep well. I was so frustrated because I couldn’t figure out how to fix myself. I ate properly, I worked out and drank plenty of water but still felt like crap. I was currently on hormone replacement therapy and could not figure out why that wasn’t helping either. I thought my doctor should know how to help me, but she never seemed to put a lot of effort into figuring out my symptoms or properly adjusting my HRT.

I had visited another doctor who told me I had long haul COVID. I also had a colonoscopy done. I had x-rays done. I had multiple lab tests done. Nothing was found. It was beyond discouraging. Other doctors recommended drugs to cure my symptoms. I wanted someone to get to the root of my problem and not just put a band aid on my symptoms or offer drugs which would only lead to more problems. I was so distraught because I could not figure this out and no one seemed to be able to help me.

That’s when I decided to try Dr. Spahr and I’m so glad I did!! By running specific lab tests and speaking with me for over an hour on my first visit, he was able to figure out the root causes of my symptoms. He recommended  specific supplements that would work for me. I was already on hormone replacement therapy, but he was able to diagnose the specific issues with that too which was a huge part of my problem.

So, now, just a few months after my first visit with Dr. Spahr, everything has changed. I sleep so much better, I’m no longer fatigued every day, I’m not cranky nor bloated which made me cranky! Life is better. And I feel so confident going forward with Dr. Spahr that when my hormones ever do get off balance, he knows exactly what to do to fix them. I honestly could not be happier!
Dr. Spahr spent a lot of time listening to me and customizing a plan that would work for me…. and it is working!

If you’re reading this review and you’re going through the same thing, you’re not alone. There is a solution. Life’s too short to feel bad all the time. Dr. Spahr can help you too.

reviews.name: places/ChIJW_EtpD6zFIgRrOR5NojneOU/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR2dXFqbHJRRRAB
reviews.text:
At 26, after coming off the birth control pill, I was told I was post menopausal and that there was nothing I could do by my OBGYN….

Let me start at the beginning, at 26 I decided it was time to get off of birth control because I was on it for 11 years straight and felt I might need a break. I was met with nothing but issues and imbalances! So, as anyone would do I turned to my doctors. After countless doctor visits to my OBGYN, primary care doc, endocrinologist etc and being gaslit that “this was normal” and “it will fix itself” I was then referred to other doctors who then told me the same thing and that “there’s nothing wrong with me” yet clearly there was.

After feeling horrible and like I was losing myself for over a year with no answers I finally found Dr.Spahr and his Hormone Balance Center.

When I met with Dr. Spahr I instantly knew I was in good hands, and after one visit with him we figured out a game plan on how to find the root causes for my ~issues~ and how we were going to fix them together! He told me that this would take time, just like my birth control took 11 years to mess me up, but I knew I was in good hands so I followed his guidance.

Here I am almost 10 months from that first initial appointment with Dr.Spahr and I’m FINALLY feeling like myself again and my body and hormones are back on track! I am now 28 and these past two years for me have been rough but I truly don’t know where I would be without the help of Dr.Spahr and his team!!! He helped me in more ways than I even thought was possible, I would give him a 1,000,000 star rating if I could!!!

He truly is a one-of-a-kind doctor that genuinely cares about you and your health!!! If you’re thinking about making an appointment with him, this is your sign!!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ5fZ3-IrmFYgR4PUb6V6K2Rg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25Ob2VrMVdNSGx6YlRKMWNscFViVUpUYVdoQlQwRRAB
reviews.text:
I am new to their office and have not been pleased! First off appointments with the doctor are very short and rushed. I had so many labs done and response to them all was, they are good! Well, why am I having severe night sweats to where I’m drenched and have to change clothes and sheets, why am I none stop hungry and can’t stop eating or thinking of food, why is my thirst never satisfied, why have I gained 25 pounds in 3 months and am fatigued and can’t lose weight no matter how hard I work or watch what I eat?
I know, I’m probably in perimenopause and heading towards my mid 40s! Or maybe something else or try taking labs again during my cycle. I don’t know But help me understand and help myself lessen these issues!
I was put in NAD+ and given pamphlets to read, well my body is sensitive to medication and was giving me hearth palpitations and making my anxiety worse. No one ever told me until I called a month later that I could breakdown the dose if it was too strong. I thought I just need to get use to it.
Next appointment I got to was at 3:15 and when I arrived they told me I was a no call no show and appointment was 2:15. I told them that was incorrect and found it in my appointment card luckily the doctor was caught and able to see me before he left thankfully.
I was at that time I was  placed on tirzepatide and love it. In the month it has helped me with so many issues I was experiencing I listed and more.
Now today was my appointment and I arrived 15 minutes late due to traffic and driving an hour to get to the facility! I go to check in and the doctor was already gone. They told me 10 minutes is the latest he will wait and their policy was just changed. I said I was not aware and every time I call and tried calling today no one will answer the phone. They said well you’d need to leave a message. Again wasn’t aware of the protocol and every time I’ve left a message, I don’t get a call back until after 4 or 5.
I asked if I could speak to a nurse just for a few questions I had since I’m so new to my medication. A nurse came out about 5 to 10 minutes later, which is totally fine. I was sitting in the lobby on a chair and she wouldn’t even come close to me and stood across the room in front of a door she came out of. Very short ant responding to everything I asked and told me twice we already talk about this, but on the call from the previous week she didn’t have the answers from not knowing and said I should have gotten a letter. I asked her my first question and her response was, I talked to you about this the other day! I explained yes but you didn’t explain the difference, so she did, then I asked why my insurance denied the pre approval and she said I told you the other day when we talked. No at that time you didn’t know. It was because my BMI was too low and I responded if they provided what it was before I started the med since I was a month in. reviews.name: places/ChIJ09SCV9rnFYgRvG_7y0TIo_E/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT210V1ZXZE5NVlF0ZVVwRlVVZHpWMkl4VmxJMlJuYxAB
reviews.text:
I have been a patient at this office for well over 10 years, since I was in high school, originally under the care of Dr. Veerula. Over the years, I stayed because of the trust I built with him and later with Denise, who was also wonderful when I transitioned to her care. Unfortunately, in the last couple of years—especially leading up to and after Dr. Veerula’s passing—the quality of care at this office has gone downhill to the point where I can no longer recommend it.
First, there has been zero consistency with providers. Without any explanation, I was suddenly switched from Denise to Jessica, and then when I showed up for my scheduled appointment with Jessica, I was told she wasn’t even there. I had to come back the next day, which cost me over an hour of driving and time out of my workday for no reason. From that point on, it seemed like I was with a different provider every single visit. Each time, they would restart my medication on the lowest dose as if I was a brand new patient, disregarding my history and continuity of care.
The scheduling and wait times are just as bad. It has become the norm to sit in the waiting room for well over an hour and a half before ever being seen, and when you finally get back, the provider often spends less than five minutes with you. My last appointment, I waited over two hours only to have the doctor rush through the visit, barely acknowledging my concerns, and still not send in my prescription. I had to follow up in person the following week because no one ever answers the phones or returns voicemails. Even then, they had no explanation for why my medication was never filled, and it simply never got sent in.
To add to the frustration, this office is almost impossible to contact. Phone calls go unanswered, voicemails are ignored, and the only way to get any response is to physically show up. That is completely unacceptable for any medical office, especially when patients rely on their providers for essential medications.
I had put up with these issues for longer than I should have because it was the only office that could reliably write my prescriptions while I waited to establish care elsewhere. But after the last round of wasted time, lack of communication, and complete disregard for patient care, I can honestly say this office is beyond unprofessional. At this point, it feels like they are just cycling patients through with no concern for their wellbeing.
After more than a decade of being a loyal patient, it’s extremely disappointing to see how far this practice has fallen. For anyone considering this office, I would strongly recommend looking elsewhere. In my opinion, this office should not even be operating given the level of disorganization, neglect, and lack of basic patient care I’ve experienced. Honestly, just give it up already and shut down.

reviews.text: My experience here started by giving them hundreds of dollars up front, getting to see the actual doctor of this practice one single time, even after several months at almost $200/mo. They did not individualize my plan whatsoever beyond the typical basic advice anyone can give you. They only followed up once in 4mos of membership, and since I may have forgotten a single dose of medication, told me to come back after a couple weeks, without giving me access to the attending physician. When I canceled my membership, that was it, they said sorry and gave no instruction or advice whatsoever on tapering off the medication they had me on. In 4mos of membership I got to speak to the only medical professional of the practice one single time. The rest of the office consists of women with no medical background whatsoever. My membership was supposed to include access to the attending doctor at any time, yet I was only ever able to speak to the receptionist or office ladies, who would loosely relay the messages between all 3 parties. I am a couple months off treatment now, and my estrogen is in the 300s (insane) and increasing still, while my testosterone declines again. With that high of estrogen I have had impactful medical problems that are troubling me greatly. I don't want to receive any care from them, their actual medical practice is neglectful and flat out dangerous. Hormones are no joke so please consider it strongly before choosing treatment, and certainly not at this practice.

reviews.text:
This has truly been a great experience.
I found out my T levels were low  over a decade ago in FL. I tried a clinic in Jacksonville  to see what could be done about it. After 3 months and a couple rushed visits the only results i saw was irritable mood and bloating.
Nikki worked 1 on 1 with me to adjust my treatment to fit my personal needs.  All of the nagging sports and gym injuries i had have completely healed. I have seen a  lean mass increase and  I am feeling better than i have in a long time.  She also went out of her way on numerous occasions to discuss other health related concerns that were not directly related to the men's health that i originally contacted her about.  I was really impressed that a health care practitioner would allot the amount of time that she has to patient care.
After my experience in Jacksonville FL it took me over a decade to decide to give it another attempt and I am very glad that i did.  I would recommend Indy Elite Men's T Clinic  to anyone who wants to get back the fully active and functional lifestyle they had in their youth.

My quality of life has increased beyond my imagination at age 60 but she can help you at any age .

reviews.text: I have been a customer for awhile now.  I just called the Greenwood location and before I could even finish my sentence the person said I'll forward you.  So they did. reviews.text: Theres no way any review less than 5 stars makes any sense. I come here every Saturday for treatments. I absolutely love this place. The staff is amazing. reviews.name: places/ChIJtwV71dJca4gR5BY1_sc8CQY/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ5d3RtVU5BEAE
reviews.text:
I am not a big review poster but I feel compelled on this occasion. I had a fantastic experience with this place for 2+ years then a switch in ownership occurred and I have to say I have never had a worse experience with a business. The communication has been horrible. When your supplies just don’t show up it’s completely up to you to try to figure out why. And good luck with that because the local center will tell you everything has to be done by phone and then the people on the phone will simply not answer (75%) or direct you back to the local center. Then, like today you will learn, only through your own investigation that you have to get labs drawn even though it’s nowhere near time. Then you drive 45 minutes relying upon their online and on the doors hours only to be informed that it’s 1:05 pm and they are on lunch from 1pm to 2pm and you can just wait. Incredible. Do better!!!

So irritating!!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ7RfqaautFIgRKMga_laW4sY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21Gd01YSjRaVXd4Ykd0Rk5FMTRXVEZJZUVOS1dIYxAB
reviews.text:
I’ve been a patient at Men’s Health Solutions for about four years, and I can honestly say it has been one of the best decisions I’ve ever made for my health and well-being. Before coming here, I worked with several other providers who simply didn’t know their craft. Most clinics follow a one-size-fits-all TRT protocol, and if that approach doesn’t work for you, they don’t have the knowledge or willingness to make adjustments. That left me frustrated, stuck, and feeling like no one was really listening.

Men’s Health Solutions is completely different. From day one, Geno and the entire staff treated me like an individual. They were professional, attentive, and genuinely listened to my concerns. Instead of just looking at lab numbers and sending me on my way, they took the time to understand how I was actually feeling and worked closely with me to develop a protocol that truly works for me. That kind of personalized care is rare, and it makes all the difference.

Over the years, I’ve been consistently impressed by their knowledge and experience. They have decades of expertise, and it shows—not only in the solutions they provide but also in the way they care for their patients. Every appointment feels collaborative; I know I’m being heard, and I know they’re committed to helping me find the best possible outcome.

I can’t say enough positive things about Men’s Health Solutions. They’ve given me the tools and guidance to feel my absolute best, and I’m incredibly grateful. If you’re looking for a clinic that truly understands men’s health, one that listens, customizes treatment, and cares about how you feel—not just your numbers—this is the place to go. Geno and the whole  team are the real deal, and I highly recommend them to anyone serious about their health.

reviews.text: I had my second child and turned 36 and things just felt off. My symptoms didn’t feel “worthy” of professional medical help, having previously chalked it up to depression or anxiety or just being a mom to two young children (but treating my symptoms as such was no longer appealing or effective). After seeing Sarah talk on social media about hormones and perimenopause, I scheduled an appointment just to rule out any kind of hormone imbalance, and lo and behold, my levels were far from optimal. Sarah was knowledgeable, kind and professional- answering all my questions and thoroughly discussing treatment options with me. In just a short period of time, I can honestly say I feel SO much better. It’s shocking…and what I’m also really thankful for is that I was able to address my issues and concerns in an environment where I felt comfortable and understood. I highly recommend Sarah and The Refinery Med Spa if you think you could benefit from hormone therapy.

reviews.name: places/ChIJuSlrSzlRa4gRA5XZDYtXo8w/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25adk5GWjFjV3BoTTBNelJWZFZPVVpCYjJaelZWRRAB
reviews.text:
I went to see Sarah in the hopes of better understanding why I feel so blah all the time, when general labs have come back okay with my GP. I was surprised when she showed me several pages of paperwork with very specific items my bloodwork tested for. She went through each item and explained everything in depth and with clarity that someone who does not work in the medical field can understand. She also then told me how it coincided with other body functions, what my numbers mean, what options I have moving forward, ect. For me it has been a game changer and told me information about my body that I couldn’t have gotten from a GP.
Sarah is kind and friendly, incredibly knowledgeable, and makes you feel like you’re chatting with a girlfriend instead of having any sort of medical interaction. I left feeling empowered and hopeful. Sarah is phenomenal at what she does and you can tell she is passionate about her job and making sure her clients get the best possible treatment. I am very much looking forward to continuing to work with her!

reviews.name: places/ChIJcSXja8UrbogRC7pF4lJRMm8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT210VVEwOHlTakZYZEZkVGJtRkhaRUpUTkZFelNWRRAB
reviews.text:
Derek is a rock star and optimize u should be grateful to have him on staff. He had the chance to bs me about how they could help me but after carefully understanding my 20 year diabetic situation realized there were no guarantees and chose to just advise me on what he really thought was going on with me. Honestly this is rare and while I didn’t sign up for the monthly plan or to continue treatments from this facility. Derek made sure the door is always open to reevaluate in a few months while I try a few other options already in process by my Dr.  Kudos for not trying to pressure me into something I wasn’t ready for and by the way. The blood work they did on me gave them a lot of opportunities to try and help me. The timing just wasn’t right for me.
Cheers to the integrity of a first class business and to Derek, who is a stand up, shoot em straight, hi integrity person working for an amazing organization that will no doubt change many lives for the better.
Sincerely
Jeff Thomas

reviews.name: places/ChIJcSXja8UrbogRC7pF4lJRMm8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xCbmNITjJWRXhyVlRWbmRXdHFSalF6ZFZSa2JWRRAB
reviews.text: The staff was very nice, and helpful .  Got some extensive blood work done to see a more detailed explanation of my heart health.  The NP that gave me my evaluation was very kind and thorough in the reading of my results.  He was in excellent shape also which to me means he’s living his own advice.  All in all my experience was great.  I did have some trouble trying to create a profile so I could see my lab results online but one of the staff helped me get that corrected..  if your wanting a more accurate assessment of your health,I would definitely recommend Optimize U.😊

reviews.name: places/ChIJcSXja8UrbogRC7pF4lJRMm8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21Sc1NsaGpPRzR4YXpkUVVEZEtXbEp4ZWxKRVYzYxAB
reviews.text:
A MUST VISIT!! I absolutely adore everyone here!! Carla has done my husband’s IVs twice now, and he’s normally just a super difficult, “stick” BUT Carla is incredible!!! She is able to get his IV going, flawlessly!! I didn’t even feel mine go in, each time  she’s done mine!! Carla is very knowledgeable, compassionate and easy to talk to!! 10/10!!

I also have to tell you that THIS is the place to get your lashes done!! I’ve been all over the area, been getting them done for years- and Trinity is the ONLY person who has done them right!!! She understood that I was tired of thick, black, heavy lashes… and gave the most natural but beautiful set that I’ve ever had!! Another 10/10!!!

Everyone here is so kind, and they take time to listen to you! There are so many other services here that I have not tried yet, because I only found them recently…. but we’re talking cold plunges, facials, sauna, etc. etc… Check out their list!!

When I was extremely sick with sinus issues a couple of months ago, nothing else would work, I was taking a ton of meds- I was on my third round of antibiotics and my second round of steroids was finished, and I came in here. I got the Mega Boost, plus Zinc, and the very next day my headache started to lesson quite a bit, then the next day- I FELT AMAZING!!!

I’m sure I will add to this review once I have done more here, but if you’re debating on where to go for an IV or to get your lashes done- Search no further! This place offers such a variety of services, it’s a one stop shop!!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJMX0bQhXNFogREGn_nl3YKRg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT214bk9UWkRTV2hRUVc1dmEwVjNTV2RqWDA0NFptYxAB
reviews.text: Just wanted to leave a review to tell you about how completely the doctor who saw me has screwed me over. After my previous doctor passed I needed to come here to get my prescription of compounded lyothyronine (T3) renewed. Without running any blood tests or discussing my symptoms this new doctor decided to place me on synthroid (T4), citing “standard practice”. Having a previously fantastic doctor, I put my trust in this new one. I never had a weight problem before and within 3 months of switching medication, I gained 50 pounds. When I called the doctor, he shrugged and said “the medication doesn’t cause weight gain” and that was the end of it. I have yet to find a doctor willing to treat my Hashimoto’s with the compounded T3 medication (the one I NEED) instead of the “standard practice” T4 medication. I do not know if that doctor is still there, but consider other options before resorting to this place.

It's been over 6 weeks and they still want to reschedule my "rescheduled " appointment. They have no care for you. Leaving is my best decision.

reviews.name: places/ChIJsTbwD1odE4gR1WQNiTlz-z0/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2sxc2QyNWZTSGRXUWxJMVFtcGpVR2xSTW5KMldWRRAB
reviews.text: I switched to PureMed for HRT after being with a different practitioner for a year. When I switched, I felt like Dr. Estes validated my concerns for switching and fully explained the difference in PureMed’s approach. Appointments have always been on time - I haven’t had to wait after my appointment time, but I have never felt rushed during my appointment. My labs were gone over thoroughly, supplements recommended, and action plan done. Everything is done in kindness and the final choice on what I want done is clearly left up to me- no pushing or persuading for anything. I would highly recommend PureMed!

reviews.name: places/ChIJsTbwD1odE4gR1WQNiTlz-z0/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tKNllqUnpOMGxMV1hWbGFIZGxiMEpRVFZadlYxRRAB
reviews.text: I’ve been going to Pure for over two years now for my HRT. I was previously going to another med spa in town that was no longer aligning with my values. From my first consultation appointment and all appointments following, I felt beyond comfortable. Not only in the service I was receiving, but the knowledge from the staff. They are very open to discussing any medical issues they see from bloodwork, as well as lifestyle advice and dietary support. I also enjoy the follow up check ins. You can tell they actually care about their patients well-being not just another number in the door. They aren’t pushy on any other services only informative on things you inquire about. I have sent multiple friends and family to Pure and will continue to do so.

reviews.name: places/ChIJsTbwD1odE4gR1WQNiTlz-z0/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t3M1NtNVpUMUpDZEU1UGRrdFhWalprUzFjMWFWRRAB
reviews.text:
Absolutely Incredible Experience!

I’ve been dealing with a shoulder injury for over 10 years, and after just one treatment with Pure Regenerative Medicine, I already feel a noticeable difference. The results are beyond what I expected.

The entire team is amazing—their professionalism, attention to detail, and level of care are unmatched. The facility is spotless, modern, and welcoming, and their customer service is top-tier from start to finish.

I can’t say enough good things about them. If you’re dealing with pain or injury, I highly recommend Pure Regenerative Medicine. They truly live up to their name—pure excellence.

reviews.name: places/ChIJsTbwD1odE4gR1WQNiTlz-z0/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT205ZlltaHJSbGR1ZFhGUlZHdzFZbU5IUld4WVJGRRAB
reviews.text: Pure has been my first and only place getting Botox. I was nervous the first time I went, but I couldn’t have felt more comfortable in their med spa! I’ve loved my results and will continue going back.

reviews.text: I had a great experience with my appointment today. Dr. Estes really took the time to listen to me and didn’t dismiss what I’ve been experiencing. I felt acknowledged, seen, and heard.
